top_apps.name: Bellweather: The Tuner
top_apps.description_short: Investigate a real-world sci-fi mystery about Maren’s 1983 disappearance.
top_apps.description_excerpt:
Bellweather: The Tuner is a free location-based mystery investigation game and alternate reality experience (ARG). Use the Tuner with your phone's camera and GPS to explore real-world places near you, find signal anomalies, walk around them to capture them in augmented reality (AR), and decode the evidence each one reveals. Read field updates from journalist Vera Liang inside the app, share findings in researcher discussions, and compare evidence with the global community of investigators.

About the investigation

Maren Calloway was tracking strange phenomena before she vanished from Linden Hollow, Ohio, on November 4, 1983. Forty-two years later, journals connected to her work were found hidden in the walls of her home on Bellweather Lane. The Bellweather Project is the public investigation into what she found, and what is happening now in the same places she once mapped.

What you do in the app

- Open the Tuner, walk to a nearby resonance point, and use your camera to find and capture the anomaly that appears there in AR
- Decode the evidence each capture reveals: field notes, recordings, photographs, coordinates, transcripts, ciphers, puzzles, and...

Each lane has its own receiver at the bottom: one for eggs, one for feathers, one for coins and one for fire. When you place an item in the right lane, you earn points. If you send an item to the wrong lane, especially fire to the wrong place, you lose one of your three lives. The game ends when you run out of lives. The visuals are vibrant and pleasant with a rich purple and gold color scheme, sparkling particle effects, and a cheerful cartoon chicken character with sunglasses at the bottom of the screen. Everything moves smoothly with satisfying animations when items land in the correct lanes.Controls are very easy - simply drag the falling items left or right to the proper lane. Sharpen your vocabulary, test your instincts, and experience the joy of words in Words For Joy — a smart and engaging word-choice puzzle game designed for players who love language, logic, and meaningful challenges.
Words For Joy is a level-based word game where every decision matters. Each level presents three carefully crafted questions, and every question gives you two possible word choices. Only one is correct. Choose wisely, because one wrong answer means failure — and you’ll need to start the level again.
This simple rule creates a surprisingly deep and exciting experience. There’s no guessing your way through. To succeed, you’ll need a solid understanding of vocabulary, context, and word usage — along with the ability to stay calm under pressure.
How the Game Works
Each level contains 3 word-selection questions
Every question offers 2 possible answers
Answer all three correctly to pass the level
One mistake ends the run

top_apps.name: 風と竜の歌
top_apps.description_short: Wind and Dragon's Healing Adventure MMO
top_apps.description_excerpt:
5月27日（水）11：00 正式リリース！
ログインだけで「SR仲間・モリバンバ」必ずGET！
更に「乗騎・順蜂宅急便」など豪華キャンペーンも実施！

千年の昔、人と竜は風の契りを結び、共に空を駆けた。
今や竜は嵐の深淵に隠れ、ただ伝説だけが残された。
風に選ばれた少年少女は竜の呼び声を感じ、契りの相手を求めて旅立った。
風と竜の冒険が、ここに幕を開ける。

▼ゲームの特長▼

【やり込み要素がたくさん】
広大な世界観と無限の育成要素、どこまでも熱くなれる放置型MMORPG！
かわいい衣装や装飾品も豊富に揃い、自由にカスタマイズ可能！
友達を作って、みんなで一緒に大冒険。
ソロでも、仲間とでも、自分だけの遊び方で楽しめる。

【初心者ボーナス満載！毎日100連ガチャもらえる】
リリース記念として、限定衣装セットをプレゼント！
さらに、毎日ログインするだけで100連ガチャがもらえる。最大2000連も可能！
デイリーサインイン・レベル達成ボーナス・育成応援特典など、初心者でも簡単に成長できる仕組みが充実。

【縦画面で片手操作も簡単！】
放置でもキャラは成長し続けるので、忙しい日常でも無理なく育成可能！
イベント報酬一括回収システム搭載、時間がなくてもサクッと回収できてストレスフリー！

【バトルこそが冒険】
個人対戦型PVP、ギルド団体戦、協力型ダンジョン、 サバイバー公平対戦型……
多彩なイベントタイプが続々登場！
お好みのイベントにぜひ参加してください。

最低動作環境
Android 4.4、RAM4GB以上

お問い合わせ：support@sp-games.com

💡 Simple Rules, Deep Strategy
The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!

top_apps.name: The Scarlet Countdown
top_apps.description_short: Absorb smaller cosmetics, dodge bigger ones—grow and survive on the vanity!
top_apps.description_excerpt:
Welcome to The Scarlet Countdown—a stylish and thrilling tabletop survival game set on a chic wooden vanity! As a cute lipstick, perfume bottle, or eyeshadow palette, your goal is simple: grow by absorbing smaller cosmetics scattered around, but beware—touch anything bigger than you, and it’s game over!

💄 How to Play:​

Swipe to Move, Absorb to Grow:​ Slide your cosmetic (like a red lipstick or green perfume bottle) around the lace-trimmed vanity. Absorb any item smaller than you to increase your size and level up.

Avoid Larger Items at All Costs:​ If you touch a cosmetic that’s bigger or higher-level—like a sparkling blue high-heel or a giant eyeshadow palette—you’ll be absorbed instantly. Stay alert and steer clear!

Plan Your Path, Survive Longer:​ With lipsticks, perfumes, compacts, and hearts scattered across the wooden floor, you’ll need sharp eyes and quick reflexes to chart a safe growth path while dodging danger.

✨ What Makes It Shine:​

Elegant, Fashion-Forward Visuals:​ Play on a light brown wooden floor with delicate white lace, glossy cosmetics, and soft lighting that feels both cozy and glamorous.
